title: Greeks should use their spare time Google Earthing Greece

enrichment.summary: Kyle suggests that unemployed Greeks use their free time to collaboratively build a detailed Google Earth overlay of Ancient Greece, including tribes, cities, populations, trade routes, and battles. He expresses frustration that this hasn't been done yet and says he's started some of it himself.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Should use it productively to map Ancient Greece on Google Earth

stances.topic: existing Google Earth Ancient Greece content
Greek collective action on this project
stances.position: Frustrated that Greeks haven't done it; embarrassing that outsiders might do it instead
